notes: Synthetic linear SEM chain for NOTEARS continuous discovery. Tolerance RequiredDirectedEdges: every true edge must appear oriented correctly; at most max_false_positive_edges extras. Not an Exact black-box pin against an upstream NOTEARS oracle (non-convex / threshold-sensitive).

reference.note: Frozen synthetic SEM; regeneration refreshes data.csv only — expected edges are the SCM ground truth, not an external solver dump.
